/AJW/CH1 SP 2 Y   M/CCC CASES 14008110 AND 15027915/X AS TO COUNT 1/DEFTO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 473 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 473 SAGE FORA TOTALOF 946 DAYS,/ADPRS1:459PC, FIRST DEGREE, A FELONY ON 09-20-11 IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/ADPRS1:25880(A)1PC, A FELONY ON 03-26-13 IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/ADPRS1:25400(A)2PC, A FELONY ON 03-26-13 IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/ADPRS1:148(D)PC, A FELONY ON 03-26-13 IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/X:TOTAL 2 YEARSSTATE PRISON/X:COURT STRIKES PRIOR STRIKES PC667(D), PC667(E), AND PC 1170,12(B)&(C) PURSUANT TO PEO V ROMERO AND PEO V WILLIAMS AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD/X:COURT STRIKES PRIOR PC667,5(B) PURSUANT TO PC1385/CCC:COUNTS 1,2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, AND 8/X: AS TO COUNT 2, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED 2 YEARS IN STATE PRISON/X: AS TO COUNT 3, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED 2 YEARS IN STATE PRISON/X: AS TO COUNT 4, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED 2 YEARS IN STATE PRISON/X:AS TO COUNT 5, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED 2 YEARS IN STATE PRISON/X: AS TO COUNT 6, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED 2 YEARS IN STATE PRISON/X: AS TO COUNT 7, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED 2 YEARS IN STATE PRISON/X: AS TO COUNT 8, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED 1 YEAR IN COUNTY JAIL/ENH:CH1:TYPE12022,1(B)PC:TI2Y:S/STATES/DNACOMP/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/

/X  THIS IS A PLEA OPEN TO THE COURT; JUDGE COLLINS/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERSVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1,2,3, 4, 5, 6, 7, AND 8//ADPRS1: 459PC, A FELONY IN THE FIRST DEGREE ON 09-20-11, IN SF COUNTY; 25850(A)(1)PC, A FELONY ON 03-26-13, IN SF COUNTY; 25400(A)(2)PC, A FELONY ON03-26-13, IN SF COUNTY; 148(D)PC, A FELONY ON 03-26-13, IN SF COUNTY; /X: THE DEFENDANT ALSO ADMITS TO PRIOR CONVICTIONS PURSUANT TO 667(D), 667(E), 1170,12(B), 1170,12(C) AS WELL AS TO 667(A)(1),/X: THE ALLEGED PRIOR PURSUANT TO 667,5(B) IS STRIKEN BY THE COURT UNDER 1385PC,/X: THE ALLEGED PRIORSOF 667(D)PC, 667(E)PC AND PC 1170,12(B)AND (C) ARE STRIKEN BY THE COURT UNDER ROMERO,/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 09-08-16/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD: SENTENCING ON 09-08-16, DEPT 23/DOP/
